title: Mind Recipe
body:
# What is this mod?👀
mind recipe is mod add more recipe 10+NEW
if you need that like me You need to dowload NOW!!!
#  /recipe give @a * (for unlock all recipe) 
###  (sorry i lazy and boring for minecraft now i play stardew valley  thx for dowload my first minecraft mod♥)
### *2/11/2025    i already play stardew almost 100% i only miss few achievements. im not gonna coming back to stardew untill it gonna drop new update. i very very want to play haunted chocolatier now in the trailer it look amzing. okay that all i want to say, take care you self goodbye :)
# Main Thing
MAKE you AND me enjoin life in minecraft with my New recipe like..!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac5b609793b1f6ff6b94d2d606b9c164b7b2ff8.png)

saddle,nametag,gunpowder,
GOD-apple
,common flower can use bonemeal in crafting And More...
# ✅ Features:
- ### Crafting table
  - Black Dye By Coal
  -  Enchanted golden apples (์need 1 golden apple and 4 gold block round)
  - Glow ink
  - Gunpowder
  - Name tag
  - saddle
  - slime ball (need 1 green dye and 1 magma cream LOL)
  - sting (with cobweb)
- ### campfire
  - leather (by fire rotten flesh)
- ### stonecutter
  -  heavy weighted pressure plate [iron pressure plate] (by cut iron door)
## 🦴 Can Get More By Use Bonemeal (Crafting table)
  -  suger cane
  - Dandelion
  - Poppy
  - Blue orchid
  - Allium
  - Azure bluet
  - Tulip (All color)
  - Oxeye daisy
  - Cornflower
  - Lily of the valley 
  - Azure Bluet
